21201.title: Keeping Up Appearances : The Mayor's Fancy Dress Ball

26333.title: Keeping Up Appearances : The Mayor's Fancy Dress Ball
26333.description: Super snob Hyacinth suddenly has a lot on her hands - attending the Mayor's fancy dress ball and getting to know an important new neighbour.
